examples: As the result shows, the tested material is a kind of temperature-sensitive parthenocarpy and express this characteristic under low temperature.
CPPU not only showed high activity in inducing parthenocarpy, the parthenocarpy set was as high as 100%, but also promoted the fruit development.
The CPPU is a kind of novel plant growth regulator which has higher activities in promoting cell division, fruit setting and inducing parthenocarpy.
